title: Commissioning Step
description: Schema for a building enclosure commissioning (BECx) step within a scope of work. Defines the commissioning phase, acceptance criteria, and documentation requirements.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this commissioning step.

title.description: Human-readable title for the commissioning step.

becx_phase.description: BECx phase classification for this step.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

responsible_party.description: Party responsible for performing this commissioning step.

acceptance_criteria.description: Criteria that must be met for this step to pass.

documentation_required.description: Documents that must be produced or collected during this step.
